form.formComment: Comes here off a 29-day let-up. At the latest run second last of 10 at this track on March 14 over 1200m, 9 len behind Blue Rain carrying 52.5kg at $8.40. Before that 9th of 11 at this track on February 7 over 1400m, 16 len behind Captain Rise carrying 52.5kg at $7.20. Hard to make a winning case.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. When well in the market at debut, 4th of 12 at this track on January 17 over 1200m, 11 len behind Eclipse Boss with 56.5kg at $1.70. Last start favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.5 len at this track March 7 over 1200m defeating Golden Match carrying 56kg at $1.50. Genuine contender in this suitable contest.

form.formComment: Third race start. Promising on debut 2nd of 12 at this track on December 21 over 1200m, 3 len behind Forever Gil carrying 54kg at $1.90. Went for a spell before returning set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 10 at this track on March 7 over 1300m, 1.0 len behind Ssoara Haha carrying 54.5kg at $1.70. Fitter again and a winning hope.

form.formComment: Returns from a 43-day let-up. Last start raced on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 11 at this track on February 28 over 1200m, 9 len behind G Flex with 54.5kg at $4.10. Before that won by 8 len at this track January 17 over 1200m defeating Pegasus King with 56.5kg at $4. Chance with the aid of an inside alley.

form.formComment: Returns from a 36-day let-up. Most recently won by 1.0 len at this track March 7 over 1300m defeating Rapid Thunder with 56.5kg at $51.30. The run before that ran last of 11 at this track on January 17 over 1400m, 27 len behind Eunpa Booster with 52.5kg at $25.80. Possesses a big finish.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 9th of 11 at this track on March 28 over 1300m, 12 len behind Raon Sapphire carrying 52.5kg at $80. Previously second-up 8th of 11 at this track on June 22 over 1300m, 15 len behind Billion Boy with 52.5kg at $39.30. Must improve significantly.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride when bumped at start.
Shifted in off heels at the 950m, tightening runners.
Near 1175m had to be steadied when runner shifted ground.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 2nd of 11 at this track on March 8 over 1300m, slow going 0.5 len behind Grace Day with 53kg at $8.90. Previously second-up won by 0.8 len at this track September 14 over 1200m on a rain affected track defeating Reverence carrying 55.5kg at $11.80. Improver with winning prospects.
